      "text": "Un stahweet swehtâ Wee-

kahrtahm/ starp jvhfeem Brah-

kahrtahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kaujeet tohs Passa-
(Jehrus)/ un fwehtijeetees/ un
pataisfajt tohs preeksch jvhfeem
Brahteem/ darridami to pehz ta
KUNGAM Wahrdü / zaur
Mohſu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Josijus dewe preeksch
teem Laudim no fhkeem Loh-
peem Jehrus un Kaslenus/ tohs
wiﬀius par Passa Uppureem/
wifteem/ kas tur atrasti tappe/
trihsdefimits tuhkstoschus Pul-
ka/ un trihs tuhkstoschus Wehr-
schus/ tas bija no ta Fehnina
Padohma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir winna Leel-Kungi de-
we par labprahtigu Uppuri

reem un Lewiteem : Ilkijus un
Sakarijus/ un Jeiels ta Deewa
Namma Wirfneeki/dewe preeksch
teem Preestereem par Passa Up-
pureem/ diwi tuhkstoschus un

simts Wehrschus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir Kananijus/ un Sema-

ti/ ar Asabiju/ un Jeiëlu un Jo-

we teem Lewiteem par Passa
Uppureem peez tuhkstofchus fih-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta tappe ta Deewa Kal-
poschana eezelta/ un tee Preesteri
stahweja sawâ Weetâ / un tee
Lewiti pehz fawahin Kahrtahm/
pehz ta Fehnina Pawehleschanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to tappe tas Passa
Uppuris kants/ un tee Preesteri
flazzinaja to Affini no fawahin
Rohkahm/un tee Lewiti noplehfe
tahs Ahdas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee nehme to Dedsa-
mo-Uppuri no teem/ ka tee tohs
teem Pulkeem to Tehwo Nam-
mo Lauschu Starpa fsdallitu /
ka tee tam KUNGAM uppure-
tu/ itt ka Mohsus Grahmata
rakstihte stahw. Ta patt arri ar
teem Wehrscheem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee zeppe to Passa
Uppuri pee Ugguns ka teefa bi-
ja/ bet tahs swehtas Leetas wah-
rija tee eekich Pohdeem/ un Kat-
leem/ un Pannahm/ un fsdallita
to drihst starp wiﬀeem Laudim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to pataisija tee ar-
ridsan fewis pehz un to Preeste-
ru pehz. Jo tee Preesteri Aaro-
na Dehti uppureja lihds vaſchu
Nafti Dedsamo-Uppurus un
tohs Tawkus/ tadeht pataisija
tee Lewiti preeksch fewis un
preeksch teem Preestereem Aaro-
na Dehleem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Dseedatajt Affa-
wa Dehli stahweja sawâs Wee-
tâs/ itt ka Dahwids/un Affaws/

Fehnina Redsetajs btj pawehlej
fcht/
"
